1.home_how_lead: From comparing jackpots to checking your numbers — four simple steps.
1.home_how_step1_text: Playing the lottery is entertainment — treat tickets as part of your fun budget, not an investment plan.
1.home_how_step2_text: Compare live jackpots for PowerBall, Mega Millions, EuroMillions and regional draws in the carousel above.
1.home_how_step3_text: Use quick pick or choose numbers in the picker. Check draw schedules before you play with an official operator.
1.home_how_step4_text: After the draw, compare your numbers with the latest results on this page or verify your ticket with the official lottery operator.
1.home_why_lead: Jackpots, recent draws and number tools — everything you need before you visit an official operator.
1.home_why_1_text: Estimated jackpots, latest draw numbers and schedules for major US and EU lotteries in one place.
1.home_why_2_text: Compare your picks with the latest published draw using the on-page number checker.
1.home_why_3_text: PowerBall, Mega Millions, EuroMillions, Florida Lotto and Lotto America — rules and pickers built in.
1.home_why_4_text: Independent guides and links to official operators — play for fun, set a budget, know the odds.
1.home_picker_lead: Pick your numbers for the next draw — switch lotteries to compare jackpots and schedules.
1.home_results_lead: Latest winning numbers and payout highlights from major draws — updated after each published result.
1.home_checker_lead: Compare your numbers with the latest published draw.
1.home_picker_line_hint_after: of %1 — tap a row on the right to edit another line
1.home_checker_no_draw_loaded: Latest draw numbers not loaded yet.
1.home_checker_no_draw_data: No draw data for this lottery. Try again after the next sync.
1.home_checker_no_matches: No matches with the winning numbers.
1.home_checker_jackpot_hint: Jackpot numbers — verify with the official lottery operator.
1.home_checker_all_main_hint: All main numbers match — verify with the official lottery operator.
1.home_picker_stage_complete: Line complete — add another line or buy ticket.
1.home_picker_main_set: Main numbers set (%1/%2). Pick %3 below (%4/%5) — red ball in ticket panel.
